title: Elbaf’s Warriors Turn Dark
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Dorry, Gerd, Robin, Unknown person #6 as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Things are really heating up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No holding back, now that a certain someone's shown up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rampage to your heart's content, my dream demons!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Elbaf, this is your doing! You brought these monsters into the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it me, or are there even more of them now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Things have...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...really spiraled out of control...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Master Dorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Master Brogy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is your Homeland!! What the hell are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Open your eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can you bear turning into something with no pride at all?!

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: Damn it!! We couldn't save the children!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: No wonder Saul failed to stop them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The kids are guarded...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: [...] notisters and invisible thorns!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: BENT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: YLA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: As if I could pass out now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I swear I'm coming to save you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just wait for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My LORD, how far are we to take this?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The board is already covered in our color.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: These nightmares are made of pure malice...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we let them rage, they'll eventually destroy themselves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Press on... until it shatters...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Until what Shatters?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The Spirit of Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: had Harold not blundered in that critical hour...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this nation wouldst long have been beneath my rightful domination.

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
